description_long: This is a rectangular, soft plastic package of Somat All in 1 dishwasher tablets, prominently featuring a bold blue 'Somat' logo on a red and orange background. The front of the package advertises a promotional offer of '+50%' and '24+12 TABS', with a visual of a single tablet and the phrase 'ALL IN 1' and '8 ACTIONS' below. The back of the package is densely covered with product information, usage instructions, and icons, all printed in white on a red background. The sides of the package are crimped and show warning symbols and additional text, with the bottom edge appearing slightly uneven, likely due to the flexible packaging. The overall appearance is that of a sealed, mass-market consumer product, with glossy, colorful graphics and a plastic exterior. The package is compact and lightweight, suitable for placement on a shelf or in a cupboard.
description: A colorful, rectangular plastic package of Somat All in 1 dishwasher tablets, featuring bold branding and promotional graphics on a glossy, flexible exterior.
description_view_0: The front view displays the Somat logo, promotional text, and a visual of a dishwasher tablet on a vibrant red and orange background.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the crimped edge, warning symbol, and partial promotional text, with less branding visible.
description_view_2: The back view is covered with dense product information, instructions, and icons in white on a red background.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals more crimped packaging, a warning symbol, and some product details, similar to the left side.
attribute_packaging_design: A flexible, rectangular plastic pouch with crimped edges, featuring bold blue and white branding on a red and orange background, and promotional graphics on the front.
